title: Create SM
story: As a Director I want to create a Strategic Meeting (SM) so that I can plan meetings with my managers
acceptance_criteria: when clicking „create SM“ button inside SM module, a Popup appears with fields „title“, „deadline“, „location“ and „participants“ which are mandatory
title field can contain up to 50 characters
deadline field can only contain a date in the format DD/MM/YYYY
location field is a dropdown with options to select from
participants field gets filtered according to which location you selected, showing a dropdown of participants belonging to that location you selected
only a deadline in the future can be selected
after clicking the „create“ button within the Pop-Up, the user is redirected to a menu within the newly created SM, where he can add actions to it
only a user with the role director can create an SM
a user with the role manager has viewing permissions, but can not create an SM
a user with the role agent can not view the SM module
a newly created SM gets an ID and appears in the dashboard of the SM module

title: View SM
story: As a Director I want to view a Strategic Meeting (SM) so that I can view details of created SM
acceptance_criteria: when clicking on the ID of an existing SM inside SM dashboard, the user is redirected to the SM of the ID he clicked on
in the menu of the SM the user clicked on, he can see the title, deadline, location and participants of the SM
a user with the role director can view all SM that were created for any manager
a user with the role manager can only view SM that he was assigned to
a user with the role agent can not view any SM

title: Edit SM
story: As a Director I want to edit a Strategic Meeting (SM) so that I can replan meetings with my managers
acceptance_criteria: in the menu of the SM the user clicked on, there is an „edit“ button
after clicking the „edit“ button, the user can change the deadline of the created SM, but only change it to another date in the future
after clicking the „edit“ button, a user can change the title of the SM to another title with a maximum of 50 characters
after clicking the „edit“ button, a user can change the participants of the SM
a user can NOT change the location or the ID of an SM
only a user with the role director can edit an SM
a user with the role manager has viewing permissions, but can not edit an SM

title: Delete SM
story: As a Director I want to delete a Strategic Meeting (SM) so that I can delete meetings with my managers
acceptance_criteria: in the menu of the SM the user clicked on, there is a „delete“ button
after clicking the „delete“ button, a Pop-Up appears asking „Are you sure to delete this SM?“ with the buttons „yes“ and „no“
after clicking the „no“ button, the Pop-Up disappears and the user is redirected to the SM
after clicking the „yes“ button, the pop-up disappears, the SM is deleted and the user is redirected to the SM dashboard
only a user with the role director can delete an SM
a user with the role manager has viewing permissions, but can not delete an SM

title: SM Dashboard
story: As a Director I want to see the Strategic Meeting (SM) Dashboard so that I can search for meetings with my managers
acceptance_criteria: the SM dashboard shows all already created SM
the SM are shown in a list, sorted by their IDs
the list is in the form of a table, with the columns „ID“, „title“, „location“, „participants“ and „deadline“
each SM is in a row, with the information like ID, title, participants etc. shown in each column
there is a search bar above where you can type in the title or ID of an SM and a search button
after typing in information into the search bar and clicking the search button, the list of SM is refreshed, showing only the SM that match the criteria you searched for
there is a reset button next to the search bar, and when you click on it all SM are shown again and the search is undone
only a user with the role director can see all SM in the dashboard
a user with the role manager can only see SM to which he was assigned to in the dashboard
a user with the role agent can not see the SM dashboard at all

title: Create Action for an SM
story: As a Director I want to create an action for a Strategic Meeting (SM) so that I can specify actions for meetings with my managers
acceptance_criteria: when opening an existing SM, there is a button inside of it called „add action“
when clicking the „add action“ button, a new window appears where you can fill in fields to create an action
the fields are called „topic“, „root cause“ and „action“ which are free text fields with a maximum number of 200 characters each
there is a dropdown field called „urgency“ and when you click on it you can select from the options low, medium and high
at the end of the page, there is a „save“ and a „cancel“ button
when clicking the „save“ button, the action is saved to the SM and displayed in the SM’s list of actions
a newly created action gets an ID that appears next to each action in the SM details page
when clicking the „cancel“ button, the user is redirected to the SM and the action was not created
only directors can create actions for SM
managers can view actions of SM they are assigned to, but can not create any

title: View Action for an SM
story: As a Director I want to view an action for a Strategic Meeting (SM) so that I can view actions for meetings with my managers
acceptance_criteria: when opening an existing SM, there is a list of actions that were created for it
the actions are sorted by urgency, with the actions with high urgency appearing at the top of the list, while the actions with medium and low urgency appear below the high urgency ones
the list of actions has the columns „action ID“, „topic“ and „urgency“
when clicking on an existing action, the user is redirected to the actions details
the details contain all the data that were filled into the fields when the action was created
a user with the role director can view all actions of SM that were created for any manager
a user with the role manager can only view actions of SM that he was assigned to
a user with the role agent can not view any SM actions

title: Edit Action for an SM
story: As a Director I want to edit an action for a Strategic Meeting (SM) so that I can change actions for meetings with my managers
acceptance_criteria: when opening an existing SM, there is a list of actions that were created for it
next to every action, there is an „edit“ button
when clicking the „edit“ button, a new window appears where you can edit the action
all fields are prefilled with the information that was filled when the action was created
the fields „topic“, „root cause“ and „action“ can be edited and have a maximum number of 200 characters each
there is a dropdown field called „urgency“ that is prefilled with the urgency level you selected before, and you can change the urgency
at the end of the page, there is a „save“ and a „cancel“ button
when clicking the „save“ button, the edited action is saved to the SM and the updated action is displayed in the SM’s list of actions
when clicking the „cancel“ button, the user is redirected to the SM and the action was not edited
only directors can edit actions for SM
managers can view actions of SM they are assigned to, but can not edit any

title: Delete Action for an SM
story: As a Director I want to delete an action for a Strategic Meeting (SM) so that I can remove actions for meetings with my managers
acceptance_criteria: when opening an existing SM, there is a list of actions that were created for it
next to every action, there is a „delete“ button
when clicking the „delete“ button, a Pop-Up appears asking „Are you sure to delete this action?“ with the buttons „yes“ and „no“
after clicking the „no“ button, the Pop-Up disappears and the user is back inside the SM
after clicking the „yes“ button, the pop-up disappears, the action is deleted and the action does not appear inside the SM anymore
only a user with the role director can delete an action of an SM
a user with the role manager can not delete an action of an SM

title: Create TM
story: As a Manager I want to create a Team Meeting (TM) so that I can plan meetings with my subordinate agents
acceptance_criteria: when clicking „create TM“ button inside TM module, a Popup appears with fields „title“, „deadline“, „location“, „subdivision“ and „participants“ which are mandatory
title field can contain up to 50 characters
deadline field can only contain a date in the format DD/MM/YYYY
location field is a dropdown with options to select from
subdivision field gets filtered according to which location you selected, showing a dropdown of subdivisions belonging to that location you selected
participants field gets filtered according to which location you selected, showing a dropdown of participants belonging to that location you selected
if you select a subdivision, the participants field gets deactivated and nothing can be filled into it
if you select a participant, the subdivision field gets deactivated and nothing can be filled into it
only a deadline in the future can be selected
after clicking the „create“ button within the Pop-Up, the user is redirected to a menu within the newly created TM, where he can add actions to it
only a user with the role manager can create an TM
a user with the role manager can only select participants or subdivisions of which he has permission to view
a user with the role director has viewing permissions, but can not create an TM
a user with the role agent can view the TM module, but can not create an TM
a newly created TM gets an ID and appears in the dashboard of the TM module

title: View TM
story: As a Manager I want to view a Team Meeting (TM) so that I can view details of created TM
acceptance_criteria: when clicking on the ID of an existing TM inside TM dashboard, the user is redirected to the TM of the ID he clicked on
in the menu of the TM the user clicked on, he can see the title, deadline, location and participants/subdivision of the TM
a user with the role director can view all TM that were created for any agent
a user with the role manager can only view TM that he created
a user with the role agent can only view TM he was assigned to

title: Edit TM
story: As a Manager I want to edit a Team Meeting (TM) so that I can replan meetings with my subordinate agents
acceptance_criteria: when clicking on the ID of an existing TM inside TM module, the user is redirected to the TM of the ID he clicked on
in the menu of the TM the user clicked on, there is an „edit“ button
after clicking the „edit“ button, the user can change the deadline of the created TM, but only change it to another date in the future
after clicking the „edit“ button, a user can change the title of the TM to another title with a maximum of 50 characters
after clicking the „edit“ button, a user can change the participants/subdivision of the TM
a user can NOT change the location or the ID of an TM
only a user with the role manager can edit an TM
a user with the role director has viewing permissions, but can not edit an TM

title: Delete TM
story: As a Manager I want to delete a Team Meeting (TM) so that I can delete meetings with my subordinate agents
acceptance_criteria: when clicking on the ID of an existing TM inside TM module, the user is redirected to the TM of the ID he clicked on
in the menu of the TM the user clicked on, there is a „delete“ button
after clicking the „delete“ button, a Pop-Up appears asking „Are you sure to delete this TM?“ with the buttons „yes“ and „no“
after clicking the „no“ button, the Pop-Up disappears and the user is back inside the TM
after clicking the „yes“ button, the pop-up disappears, the TM is deleted and the user is redirected to the TM dashboard
only a user with the role manager can delete an TM
a user with the role director has viewing permissions, but can not delete an TM

title: TM Dashboard
story: As a Manager I want to see the Team Meeting (TM) Dashboard so that I can search for meetings with my subordinate agents
acceptance_criteria: the TM dashboard shows all already created TM
the TM are shown in a list, sorted by their IDs
the list is in the form of a table, with the columns „ID“, „title“, „location“, „participants/subdivision“ and „deadline“
each TM is in a row, with the information like ID, title, participants etc. shown in each column
there is a search bar above where you can type in the title or ID of an TM and a search button
after typing in information into the search bar and clicking the search button, the list of TM is refreshed, showing only the TM that match the criteria you searched for
there is a reset button next to the search bar, and when you click on it all TM are shown again and the search is undone
only a user with the role director can see all TM in the dashboard
a user with the role manager can only see TM which he created in the dashboard
a user with the role agent can only see TM created for him in the dashboard

title: Create Action for an TM
story: As a Manager I want to create an action for a Team Meeting (TM) so that I can specify actions for meetings with my subordinate agents
acceptance_criteria: when opening an existing TM, there is a button inside of it called „add action“
when clicking the „add action“ button, a new window appears where you can fill in fields to create an action
the fields are called „topic“, „root cause“ and „action“ which are free text fields with a maximum number of 200 characters each
there is a dropdown field called „urgency“ and when you click on it you can select from the options low, medium and high
at the end of the page, there is a „save“ and a „cancel“ button
when clicking the „save“ button, the action is saved to the TM and displayed in the TM’s list of actions
a newly created action gets an ID that appears next to each action in the TM details page
when clicking the „cancel“ button, the user is redirected to the TM and the action was not created
directors can view all actions of any TM, but not create any
managers can create actions for any TM they created
agents can not create any actions for any TM

title: View Action for an TM
story: As a Manager I want to view an action for a Team Meeting (TM) so that I can view actions for meetings with my subordinate agents
acceptance_criteria: when opening an existing TM, there is a list of actions that were created for it
the actions are sorted by urgency, with the actions with high urgency appearing at the top of the list, while the actions with medium and low urgency appear below the high urgency ones
the list of actions has the columns „action ID“, „topic“ and „urgency“
when clicking on an existing action, the user is redirected to the actions details
the details contain all the data that were filled into the fields when the action was created
a user with the role director can view all actions of TM that were created by any manager
a user with the role manager can only view actions of TM that he created
a user with the role agent can only view actions of TM he is assigned to

title: Edit Action for an TM
story: As a Manager I want to edit an action for a Team Meeting (TM) so that I can change actions for meetings with my subordinate agents
acceptance_criteria: when opening an existing TM, there is a list of actions that were created for it
next to every action, there is an „edit“ button
when clicking the „edit“ button, a new window appears where you can edit the action
all fields are prefilled with the information that was filled when the action was created
the fields „topic“, „root cause“ and „action“ can be edited and have a maximum number of 200 characters each
there is a dropdown field called „urgency“ that is prefilled with the urgency level you selected before, and you can change the urgency
at the end of the page, there is a „save“ and a „cancel“ button
when clicking the „save“ button, the edited action is saved to the TM and the updated action is displayed in the TM’s list of actions
when clicking the „cancel“ button, the user is redirected to the TM and the action was not edited
directors can not edit actions for TM
managers can edit actions of TM that they created
agents can not edit any actions of any TM

title: Delete Action for an TM
story: As a Manager I want to delete an action for a Team Meeting (TM) so that I can remove actions for meetings with my subordinate agents
acceptance_criteria: when opening an existing TM, there is a list of actions that were created for it
next to every action, there is a „delete“ button
when clicking the „delete“ button, a Pop-Up appears asking „Are you sure to delete this action?“ with the buttons „yes“ and „no“
after clicking the „no“ button, the Pop-Up disappears and the user is back inside the TM
after clicking the „yes“ button, the pop-up disappears, the action is deleted and the action does not appear inside the TM anymore
a user with the role director can not delete any actions of any TM
a user with the role manager can delete an action of an TM that he created
a user with the role agent can not delete any actions of any TM

title: View Calendar View
story: As a Director/Manager/Agent I want to see SM/TM inside a calendar view so that I can easily see the schedule for upcoming SM/TM
acceptance_criteria: the calendar view shows the current month’s schedule of the logged in user by default
there are arrows on top of the calendar
when clicking the left arrow, the user can see the past months’ schedule up to 3 months ago
when clicking the right arrow, the user can see the future month’s schedule up to 6 months ahead
SM are marked red in the calendar, TM are marked blue and they appear in the calendar for the day they were scheduled for
directors can see SM they created for other managers by default
managers can see SM that were created for them, and TM that they created for their subordinate agents
agents can only see TM that were created for them

title: Search for other Calendar Views
story: As a Director/Manager I want to search for other users Calendar Views so that I can inform myself about their schedules
acceptance_criteria: there is a search bar above the calendar view
when clicking the search bar, the logged in user can type in the name of another user
after searching for a user and clicking the search button, the calendar view shows the calendar of the searched user
directors can search for the calendar view of any manager and any agent
managers can only search for the calendar view of subordinate agents
agents can not see the search bar and can not see other users’ calendars
if a director types in the name of a user that does not exist and searches, there is an error message displayed saying „The user you searched for does not exist“
if a manager types in the name of a user that does not exist, there is an error message displayed saying „The user you searched for does not exist“
if a manager types in the name of a user that is not his subordinate, there is an error message displayed saying „You do not have permission to view this user’s calendar“

title: Drag and Drop Meetings within Calendar View
story: As a Director/Manager I want to drag and drop meetings inside Calendar View so that I can reschedule meetings with my subordinates
acceptance_criteria: an SM or TM can only be dragged and dropped to a date that is in the future or today
a manager can not drag and drop any SM at all
a manager can drag and drop an TM that he created to another day within the calendar view
a director can drag and drop TM created by any manager to another day within the calendar view
a director can drag and drop any SM he created to another day within the calendar view
an agent can not drag and drop any TM at all
when a meeting gets rescheduled, all participants of the meeting get a notification „RESCHEDULED: SM/TM with the title …“

title: Cancel, Accept or Decline Meetings within Calendar View
story: As a Director/Manager/Agent I want to cancel, accept or decline meetings inside Calendar View so that I can notify other users if I can partake in meetings
acceptance_criteria: in the calendar view, an SM or TM can be accepted or declined
a director can view all SM and TM, but can only cancel meetings and can not accept or decline them
a manager can accept or decline SM he was assigned to, and cancel TM that he created
an agent can accept or decline TM he was assigned to, and can not cancel any meeting
when a user accepts a meeting, the creator of the meeting gets a notification „ACCEPTED: User [surname, first name] accepted the SM/TM with the title …“
when a user declines a meeting, the creator of the meeting gets a notification „DECLINED: User [surname, first name] declined the SM/TM with the title …“
when a meeting gets cancelled, all participants who accepted the meeting or did not accept/decline yet get a notification „CANCELLED: SM/TM with the title …“
when a meeting gets cancelled, all participants who declined the meeting do not get any notification at all

title: Evaluate Employees
story: As a Director/Manager I want to evaluate managers/subordinate agents so that I can assess their performance
acceptance_criteria: in the „Evaluate Employees“ dashboard, a logged in director can see a filter named „location“, a search bar and a „search“ button
when a director enters a location into the filter and clicking the search button, managers appear that belong to the selected location
in the search bar, the logged in director can search for managers
a director can only evaluate managers, not agents
when director clicks on a manager, he gets redirected to the evaluation page of that manager
a manager can NOT see the location filter
a manager can see the search bar and the „search“ button
a manager can search for his subordinate agents and can not search for any other user
a manager can only evaluate agents
when manager searches for an agent that is his subordinate, he gets redirected to the evaluation page of that agent

in the evaluation page, the logged in user sees the following fields and a scale to select from: efficiency (scale 1 to 5) reliability (scale 1 to 5) communication (scale 1 to 5) comment (a mandatory free-text field with a maximum of 300 characters)
all fields are mandatory except the comment field
if a mandatory field is not filled and the user clicks „save“ button, an error message appears saying „Please fill all mandatory fields“
there is a save and cancel button at the end of the page
when clicking „save“, the user gets redirected to the „Evaluate Employees“ dashboard and the evaluation is saved and a notification appears saying „the evaluation was successfully saved“
after an evaluation was successfully saved, it gets an ID and appears in the „Evaluate Employees“ dashboard
the dashboard shows a list of evaluations created by the logged in user, with the columns „ID“, „date“ and „employee“
when clicking „cancel“, the user gets redirected to the „Evaluate Employees“ dashboard and the evaluation is not saved
when an evaluation was successfully saved, the evaluated user gets a notification saying „EVALUATION: A new evaluation was created for you“

title: View My Evaluations
story: As a Manager/Agent I want to view evaluations created for me so that I can be informed about my performance
acceptance_criteria: in the „My Evaluations“ dashboard, a logged in manager or agent can view evaluations created for himself
the evaluations are sorted by the date when they were created
the columns in the „My Evaluations“ dashboard are „ID“ and „date“, showing the ID and date of the created evaluation

when clicking on an evaluation, the user sees the following aspects, and the score that the creator of the evaluation selected: efficiency (scale 1 to 5) reliability (scale 1 to 5) communication (scale 1 to 5) comment (text with a maximum of 300 characters)
there is a „back“ and an „appeal“ button at the end of the page
when clicking „back“, the user gets redirected to the „My Evaluations“ dashboard
when clicking „appeal“, a pop-up appears with a mandatory free-text field with a maximum of 500 characters, along with a save and cancel button
after clicking cancel, the pop-up disappears and nothing was sent
when clicking „save“ after entering nothing into the field, an error message appears saying „To raise an appeal, a comment is mandatory“
when entering a text into the field and clicking „save“ the user gets a notification saying „The appeal was successfully sent“
when an appeal was sent, the creator of the evaluation gets a notification saying „EVALUATION: A user you evaluated has raised an appeal“
an appeal can only be raised for evaluations that are not older than 1 week
